items.title: Coachella kicks off with Sabrina Carpenter and surprise guests
items.dek: The festival in California was also forced to cancel a set by DJ Anyma on Friday because of strong winds.

items.title: Liverpool player ratings: 17-year-old Ngumoha's 9/10 performance creates dilemma for Slot
items.dek: Rio Ngumoha looked experienced beyond his years in Liverpool's win over Fulham.

items.title: Texas A&M lands star scorer Haggerty via portal
items.dek: Kansas State transfer P.J. Haggerty, one of the most prolific scorers in college basketball, has committed to Texas A&M.
items.body: Kansas State transfer P.J. Haggerty, one of the most prolific scorers in college basketball, has committed to Texas A&M.
